trigger_condition: Subject name matches derivative-like keyword but no contract identifier is present
notes: Do not force into ordinary positions

trigger_condition: Margin-like balance exists and derivative context is plausible but no linked contract can be identified
review_reason: Margin cannot be attributed to a specific contract
required_supplemental_data: Margin statement or linked settlement detail
notes: Keep as accounting subject plus review item

trigger_condition: Derivative fair-value movement exists but the underlying asset is unknown
review_reason: Cannot determine exposure or business meaning
notes: Contract candidate may still be recorded at Level 1

trigger_condition: OTC-style wording is present but no counterparty is visible
review_reason: Counterparty is required for OTC control
notes: Applies to swap option forward scenes

trigger_condition: Derivative-like subject exists but long short or pay receive direction is absent
review_reason: Direction is needed for exposure sign and review
notes: Do not infer from balance sign alone

trigger_condition: Derivative source wording suggests hedging context beyond ordinary fair-value-through-PnL handling
notes: Round 5A records this only as a future review rule
